/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/npu_infer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/npu_infer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/npu_infer.dir/src/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/npu_infer.dir/src/model.c.o -o npu_infer  libnpu_model.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libxrt_coreutil.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libxrt_core.so -lm -ldl -luuid
